---
title: "Courses"
---

## Engineering Design

### ENGG 1100 - Engineering and Design I

### ENGG 1410 - Intro to Programming for Engineers


## First Principles Sciences

### PHYSICS 1130 - Physics with Applications

### MATH 1200 - Calculus I

## Chemistry


### CHEM 1040 - General Chemistry I



---

## Public calendar {#public-calendar}
